reference: I have a vascular disease called LCV, which is a rather rare condition. Recently, I had a couple of very bad coughing episodes, one of which took place at work—a school, as I am a teacher. A nurse was brought in, and he took my blood pressure, which was very high. He said I was hypertensive. Was this just due to the chest cold, or could it be due to the LCV?
text: The possibility of such a war was not foreseen in 1914
